user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Pacific Northwest Outfitters.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 12:09 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Pacific Northwest Outfitters security posture

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
Date: 2024-02-07 14:26 EST
Subject: Re: Re: security posture Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with security posture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-12 10:18 EST
Subject: Re: Re: security posture Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: security posture Discussion - Pacific Northwest Outfitters
Date: 2024-01-20
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters)

[00:01:15] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is security posture.

[00:07:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:12:00] David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:17:00] David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:19:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:23:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:27:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.
